price: Ako bi se ti pokoravao većini onih koji žive na Zemlji, oni bi te od Allahova puta odvratili; oni se samo za pretpostavkama povode, i oni samo laži izmišljaju.
arabic: وَإِن تُطِعۡ أَكۡثَرَ مَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ يُضِلُّوكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَإِنۡ هُمۡ إِلَّا يَخۡرُصُونَ

version.title: Bosnian Translation - Muhammad Mihanovich
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into Bosnian by Muhammad Mihanovich, printed in 2013. some referred verses corrected by Supervision of Rowwad Translation Center. The original translation is available for suggestions, continuous evaluation, and development.

meta.transliteration: wa-in tuṭiʿ akthara man fī al-arḍi yuḍillūka ʿan sabīli al-lahi in yattabiʿūna illā al-ẓana wa-in hum illā yakhruṣūna
